use_cases: Embedding interactive 3D scenes directly into React applications
Creating immersive product showcases with real-time 3D graphics
Adding animated 3D backgrounds to landing pages and hero sections
Building engaging interactive storytelling experiences on websites
Developing dynamic visual elements for marketing campaigns
ai_summary: A lightweight React wrapper around the Spline 3D library that lazy-loads interactive 3D scenes with Suspense fallback support. Enables seamless integration of WebGL-based 3D graphics in React apps with minimal configuration overhead.
